top_signals.title: Industry, Government Leaders Convene for Innovation Café on Small Modular Reactors
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Center for Maritime Innovation (USCMI), with the Maritime Administration and facilitated by the American Bureau of Shipping (ABS), convened maritime, energy, and public-sector leaders for its Innovation Café focused on Small Modular Reactor (SMR) technologies for maritime applications…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
